overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character exploring a desert settlement with adobe-style buildings under clear blue skies. The character walks through open dirt courtyards and narrow alleyways in a rural desert environment with snow-capped mountains visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the open compound toward the center building

entered.detail: single-story stucco building with flat roof and small windows
single-story building with chimney and satellite dish on roof
small building with red chimney visible in the distance
snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon
satellite antenna mounted on roof of right building

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open desert compound with adobe buildings on either side. The ground is bare dirt, and snow-capped mountains are visible in the far distance under a clear blue sky.

events.description: character turns right to walk along the building perimeter
snow-capped mountains become prominently visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the right side of the compound with mountains now visible to the right

entered.detail: vast white salt flat or dry lake bed visible beyond the buildings
brick chimney on the roof of the cream building

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and walks along the building perimeter, revealing a vast salt flat and snow-capped mountains to the right. The cream-colored building remains on the right while the yellow building recedes into the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: central compound area approaching narrow passage

events.description: character turns left and walks back toward the compound center
character walks into shadow cast by surrounding buildings

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the center and walking toward a narrow alley entrance between buildings

entered.detail: narrow opening between two adobe buildings leading to another area

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and walks back through the compound center, passing through shadowed areas cast by the buildings. The alley entrance between buildings becomes visible ahead as the mountains disappear from view.

events.description: character enters narrow alleyway between two adobe buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow passage between close walls toward a wooden pergola structure

entered.detail: close wall of tan stucco with small window
close wall with white door frame and wooden door
wooden beam structure providing partial cover over the path
closed wooden door with white frame on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow alleyway between close adobe walls, transitioning from open sunlight to a more enclosed, shaded space. A wooden pergola structure is visible ahead as the character walks through the confined passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide desert compound that gradually narrows into a confined, shaded alleyway. It begins with the character walking across a bare dirt courtyard flanked by adobe buildings, with snow-capped mountains standing sharply against a clear blue sky. As the character turns right to follow the building perimeter, the view opens up to reveal a vast salt flat stretching toward the distant peaks. The scene then shifts as the character turns back toward the center of the compound, moving through deepening shadows that eventually obscure the mountains from view. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the open sunlight and enter a narrow passage between close adobe walls, heading toward a wooden pergola structure.
